creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to alt2600 from comment #13)
> A reasonable middleground that doesn't require hacking in patches to third party configured downloads seems to be possible. 

This is already done for example for 'ade', which is downlaoded and moved to the proper location, with some patching of the init-cmake file.

This should be added for the others too (note, that inside poudirere no downloading will happen).


mfg Tobias
